project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Fastify backends, Next.js frontends, shared packages
build_system: pnpm 10 + Turborepo 2. Tasks: build depends on ^build, typecheck depends on ^build, test depends on ^build.
test_framework: vitest 2 with vitest.config.ts in each package. Tests in src/__tests__/ or backend/__tests__/ directories.
verification_instructions: 1) pnpm install, 2) pnpm --filter @quant/database run db:generate, 3) pnpm turbo typecheck, 4) pnpm turbo test, 5) pnpm turbo lint, 6) pnpm turbo build
snapshot_or_generated_files: packages/database generates Prisma Client via 'prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma'. Output lands in node_modules/.pnpm/@prisma+client*/.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node 22 via nvm. No Docker daemon needed for validation. No real PostgreSQL/Redis available - tests mock Prisma.
contribution_requirements: ESLint with no-console rule, prettier formatting, conventional commits, turbo pipeline ordering.
key_patterns: All backends use createApp() from @quant/server-core which returns a Fastify instance. Routes access prisma via (fastify as unknown as {prisma: unknown}).prisma cast. Services accept a prisma client in constructor. Auth is checked manually in each route via request.auth?.userId. Tests use vitest with mock prisma.
directory_structure: apps/ has 16 frontend+backend apps. packages/ has 85+ shared packages. Root has turbo.json, tsconfig.json with project references. Each backend app has backend/app.ts using createApp() from @quant/server-core.
